headline: Vinci’s New Contracts Deepen Role In Low Carbon And Fusion Projects
summary: Vinci (ENXTPA:DG) has secured contracts to upgrade river locks on the Rhône in France, supporting low carbon river transport. The group, via subsidiary Nuvia, also won a multi year contract for critical infrastructure on the UK's STEP fusion energy prototype project. These wins expand Vinci's role in European energy transition and next generation clean energy projects. Vinci, trading at around €127.1, is an established player in European concessions and construction. These contracts add...
